checks.name: profile.pin
checks.detail: profile pin matches compatibility lockfile Hermes pin

checks.name: profile.requiredOutputs
checks.detail: all required profile artifacts were generated

checks.name: profile.classification
checks.detail: all generated artifacts are classified and no raw secret file is emitted

checks.name: profile.noRawSecrets
checks.detail: generated artifacts contain placeholders and relay references only

checks.name: profile.noSourceReplacement
checks.detail: generated profile contains extensions only, with no Hermes source replacement, patch, or monkeypatch artifact

checks.name: profile.directoryInventory
checks.detail: generated profile directory contains exactly the canonical outputs

checks.name: profile.secretOwners
checks.detail: profile secret manifest assigns model/provider secrets to vault and public-channel secrets to edge

checks.name: profile.trustDomainRoster
checks.detail: generated profile roster includes every cutover trust domain and per-profile manifest

checks.name: profile.memoryBoundaries
checks.detail: private, public, household, social, specialist, and control memory namespaces are separated

checks.name: profile.edgePolicies
checks.detail: enabled public, household, and social channels route through Telclaude edge sidecars

checks.name: profile.workspaceIsolation
checks.detail: non-private trust domains cannot mount the private operator workspace
